zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Welles於1350年出生在英國林可爾史爾波東普時，她的父親John Welles 4th Lord Welles16歲，母親Maude de Ros18歲。她於1373年12月15日之前與Sir Stephen Scrope在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1422年5月29日在英國越可爾享年72歲，埋葬在英國越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Welles于1350年出生在英国林可爾史爾波東普时，她的父亲John Welles 4th Lord Welles16岁，母亲Maude de Ros18岁。她于1373年12月15日之前与Sir Stephen Scrope在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1422年5月29日在英国越可爾享年72岁，埋葬在英国越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Welles was born in 1350, in Bonthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, her father, John Welles 4th Lord Welles, was 16 and her mother, Maude de Ros, was 18. She married Sir Stephen Scrope before 15 December 1373, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 29 May 1422, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Welles est née en 1350, à Bonthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John Welles 4th Lord Welles, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Maude de Ros, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Stephen Scrope avant 15 décembre 1373, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 29 mai 1422, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Welles 1350 in Bonthorpe, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Welles 4th Lord Welles 16 und ihre Mutter Maude de Ros 18. Sie hat vor 15. Dezember 1373 in Yorkshire, England Sir Stephen Scrope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 29. Mai 1422 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Welles è nata il nel 1350 nel Bonthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, John Welles 4th Lord Welles, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Maude de Ros, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir Stephen Scrope prima del 15 dicembre 1373, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 maggio 1422, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Wellesが1350年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボンソルペで生まれた時，父John Welles 4th Lord Wellesは16歳，母Maude de Rosは18歳であった。1373年12月15日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir Stephen Scropeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1422年5月29日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで72歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Welles(이)가 1350년 영국 링코실르 본소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Welles 4th Lord Welles(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude de Ros(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1373년 12월 15일 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 Sir Stephen Scrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1422년 5월 29일 영국 요르크실르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Welles nasceu em 1350, em Bonthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Welles 4th Lord Welles, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Maude de Ros, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Stephen Scrope antes 15 de dezembro de 1373, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 29 de maio de 1422, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Welles родилась в 1350 г. в местности бонтаурп, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Welles 4th Lord Welles было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude de Ros, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Stephen Scrope перед 15 декабрь 1373 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 29 мая 1422 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Welles nació en 1350, en Bonthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Welles 4th Lord Welles, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Maude de Ros, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir Stephen Scrope antes de 15 de diciembre de 1373, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1422, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
